common.pwaInstallHintIOSSafari: iOS Safari does not show an automatic install prompt. Tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".
common.pwaInstallHintIOSChrome: iOS Chrome does not show an automatic install prompt. Tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".

nav.refreshPageConfirm: Are you sure you want to refresh the page? Unsaved content will be lost.

device.title: Device Management
device.addDeviceDescription: Fill in device details and choose a connection method
device.noDevicesDescription: Add a local or SSH device to get started
device.name: Device Name
device.sshConfigRefHint: A Host alias from your ssh config, resolved via `ssh -G`. Not the path to the config file.
device.deleteDescription: Device "{{name}}" will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
device.subtitle: {{username}}@{{host}}:{{port}}

keyboardBehavior.title: Keyboard Behavior
keyboardBehavior.description: How the page makes room for the on-screen keyboard
keyboardBehavior.modeLiftDesc: Move the whole page up; terminal size stays the same
keyboardBehavior.modeResizeDesc: Shrink the terminal to fit above the keyboard (changes the remote window size)
keyboardBehavior.modeFollowDesc: Shift just enough to keep the cursor right above the keyboard; terminal size stays the same

terminal.windowClosed: Current window has been closed, please select a window from the sidebar.
terminal.paneClosed: Current pane has been closed, please select a pane from the sidebar.
terminal.pasteFailed: Could not read clipboard, check browser permissions

settings.title: System Settings

deviceManagement.title: Device Management
deviceManagement.description: Add, edit, and connect to your local and SSH devices.

settings.restartConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart Gateway? This will interrupt all active connections.

llm.title: LLM Providers
llm.name: Name
llm.baseUrlHint: Adds /v1 automatically; end with / to keep the path as-is
llm.apiKeySetPlaceholder: Already set, leave blank to keep
llm.modelsHint: Manage the available models for this provider: toggle and add manually
llm.defaultModelPlaceholder: Type or pick a model ID

search.title: Search
search.responsesApiHint: If your LLM provider uses the OpenAI Responses API protocol, it can use that API's built-in hosted search tool; the third-party search below is an optional supplement.
search.keySetPlaceholder: Already set, leave blank to keep
search.clearKeyConfirm: Clear this API key? You will need to enter it again.

files.title: Files
files.description: Per-device directories browsable in the Files tab. Local devices read directly; SSH devices use rsync.
files.noDevices: No devices yet — add one first
files.pathHint: Absolute path on the selected device.
files.deleteDesc: Remove "{{path}}" from the whitelist? Files under it will no longer be accessible.

version.title: Version & Updates
version.upToDate: You are on the latest version.
version.changelogUnavailable: No changelog available for this version.
version.upgradeDisabledDev: In-app update is disabled outside the production environment.
version.upgradeDisabledNonCli: In-app update is only available for CLI installations.
version.upgradeWarningBody: Upgrading restarts the service and will interrupt your current session. It may also affect the survival of tmux processes managed by the service. Continue?
version.stateExecuting: Applying the upgrade, the service is restarting…
version.interruptNotice: The connection will drop while the service restarts; it will recover shortly.
version.terminalHint: Or upgrade from a terminal: npx tmex-cli@<version> upgrade

telegram.title: Telegram Bot Management
telegram.noBots: No bots yet, add one first.
telegram.agentCredentialWarning: ⚠️ {{siteName}}: A message in agent session "{{sessionTitle}}" appears to contain credentials ({{types}}). It will be sent to the LLM and stored — risk of leakage.
telegram.authSuccess: ✅ Authorized. You will now receive notifications.
telegram.authPending: ⏳ Authorization request received. Please approve in tmex settings.
telegram.authFailed: ❌ Authorization request failed. Please contact administrator.
telegram.botNotRunning: Bot is not running or unavailable

sshError.sshConfigRefNotSupported: SSH Config reference is not supported in this version. Please use host + username with Agent/Key/Password authentication.
sshError.configRefNotSupported: SSH Config reference is not supported in this version. Please use host + username with Agent/Key/Password authentication.
sshError.agentUnavailable: SSH Agent unavailable: SSH_AUTH_SOCK not detected. Please check agent environment.
sshError.agentNoIdentity: SSH Agent has no available keys. Please run ssh-add first.
sshError.agentNoIdentities: SSH Agent has no available keys. Please run ssh-add first.
sshError.authFailed: Authentication failed: incorrect username, password, or key. Please check device configuration.
sshError.authFailedGeneric: Authentication failed: incorrect username, password, or key. Please check device configuration.
sshError.networkUnreachable: Network unreachable: Please check routing, firewall, or VPN configuration.
sshError.connectionRefused: Connection refused: Unable to connect to target host. Please check host address and port.
sshError.timeout: Connection timeout: Unable to connect to device. Please check network or firewall settings.
sshError.connectionTimeout: Connection timeout: Unable to connect to device. Please check network or firewall settings.
sshError.hostNotFound: Host not found: Unable to resolve hostname. Please check DNS or hostname configuration.
sshError.handshakeFailed: Handshake failed: Unable to establish secure connection. Possibly incompatible key exchange algorithm.
sshError.tmuxUnavailable: Remote tmux unavailable or failed to start. Please ensure tmux is installed and available in the remote shell PATH.

apiError.siteUrlInvalid: Site URL must start with http:// or https://
apiError.bellThrottleInvalid: Bell throttle seconds must be between 0-300
apiError.sshRetriesInvalid: SSH reconnect retries must be between 0-20
apiError.sshDelayInvalid: SSH reconnect delay must be between 1-300 seconds
apiError.languageInvalid: Language must be one of the supported locales
apiError.sshRequiresHost: SSH device requires host or sshConfigRef
apiError.llmProviderProtocolInvalid: Protocol must be openai-chat or openai-responses
apiError.llmProviderBaseUrlInvalid: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
apiError.llmNoDefaultProvider: No LLM provider specified and no default provider configured
apiError.llmNoDefaultModel: No model specified and no default model configured
apiError.llmSearchProviderInvalid: Search provider must be none, tavily or brave
apiError.agentSessionBusy: Agent session is currently running, stop it or wait for completion
apiError.agentSessionAwaitingConfirmation: Agent session has pending confirmations, resolve them first
apiError.agentWriteModeInvalid: Write mode must be confirm or auto
apiError.agentMaxStepsInvalid: Max steps per turn must be between 1 and 100
apiError.agentProviderWebSearchRequiresResponses: Provider built-in web search requires the openai-responses protocol
apiError.agentHostedToolRequiresResponses: Provider hosted tools require the openai-responses protocol
apiError.agentSessionOrphaned: This agent session is orphaned (its terminal is gone) and is read-only
apiError.watchTriggerTypeInvalid: Trigger type must be match, unchanged or llm
apiError.watchPatternRequired: match/unchanged rules require a regular expression
apiError.watchUnchangedMinutesInvalid: unchanged rules require unchangedMinutes greater than 0
apiError.watchExtractGroupInvalid: Capture group index must be an integer >= 0
apiError.watchConditionPromptRequired: llm rules require a condition prompt
apiError.watchIntervalInvalid: Sampling interval must be at least {{min}} seconds
apiError.watchNoMatchBehaviorInvalid: No-match behavior must be reset or ignore
apiError.watchFireModeInvalid: Fire mode must be once or repeat
apiError.watchCooldownInvalid: Cooldown seconds must be an integer >= 0
apiError.fileRootInvalid: Path must be an absolute, existing directory
apiError.fileOutsideRoots: Path is outside the allowed directories
apiError.fileRootDuplicate: This directory is already added for the device
apiError.upgradeNotAllowed: In-app update is not available for this installation.
apiError.upgradeInProgress: An upgrade is already in progress.
apiError.updateCheckFailed: Failed to query the npm registry.

notification.clickToJump: Click to jump to corresponding pane

agent.confirmationPending: Agent "{{title}}" requests to run tool {{toolName}}, awaiting confirmation

watch.unchangedTriggered: Watch "{{name}}" value "{{value}}" has been unchanged for {{minutes}} minutes
watch.ruleError: Watch "{{name}}" failed {{count}} times in a row and has been disabled: {{message}}
watch.paneGone: Watch "{{name}}" pane ({{paneId}}) was destroyed; the rule has been removed

error.streamStalled: The model stopped responding (upstream stream stalled). Please retry.

model.noProviders: No models — configure a provider in Settings

queue.title: Queued ({{count}})
queue.steerHint: Interrupt the current step and inject the queue now

orphan.readonly: This session is orphaned (its terminal is gone) — read-only
orphan.title: Orphaned

welcome.title: New Agent chat
welcome.subtitle: Describe your task to start working in the selected terminal

session.selectPaneHint: Select a pane in the Panes tab to start a session
session.deleteDesc: "{{title}}" and all its messages will be permanently deleted.
session.createDisabledNoPane: Open a terminal pane to create a session
session.privacyNotice: Sessions send terminal screen content to the configured LLM service.

binding.mismatchTitle: This session is bound to a different pane

toast.credentialWarningDescription: Detected {{types}}. The content is not modified, but it will be sent to the LLM and stored — risk of leakage.

window.closeConfirmDesc: Processes running in "{{name}}" will be terminated. This action cannot be undone.
window.renameDesc: The custom name overrides the title set by the terminal and is kept until the gateway restarts.

watch.title: Watch rules
watch.dialogDesc: Monitor this pane's screen and get notified when conditions are met

rules.empty: No watch rules for this pane yet

typeDesc.match: Trigger when a regex matches the screen
typeDesc.unchanged: Trigger when an extracted value stays unchanged for N minutes (e.g. stalled download)
typeDesc.llm: An LLM periodically checks the screen against a natural-language condition

form.name: Rule name
form.extractGroupHint: 0 = whole match; the group value is tracked over time
form.noMatchReset: Reset timer (progress line gone = task done)
form.conditionPromptPlaceholder: e.g. The build has failed with a compile error
form.modelRequiredHint: This rule calls an LLM. Make sure the selected (or global default) model is available.
form.confirmWithLlmDesc: Reduce false positives; fails open if the model is unavailable
form.summarizeWithLlmDesc: Summarize the screen into the notification text
form.assistPlaceholder: e.g. match the download progress percentage
form.assistPreviewEmpty: No matches on the current screen sample

validation.unchangedMinutesInvalid: Unchanged minutes must be greater than 0
validation.intervalMin: Sampling interval must be at least {{min}} seconds

toast.modelUnavailableHint: The rule keeps running with degraded behavior.

notifPermission.title: Enable browser notifications?
notifPermission.desc: Get notified when watch rules trigger, even when this tab is in the background.

validation.hostRequired: Host is required for SSH devices
validation.portRequired: A valid port is required for SSH devices
validation.usernameRequired: Username is required for SSH devices
validation.sshConfigRequired: SSH config path is required for SSH devices

error.rsync_missing_remote: rsync is not installed on the remote device

install.prompt: rsync is not installed on {{device}} ({{scope}}). Please install rsync using the appropriate command for this system (e.g. `brew install rsync`, `sudo apt-get install -y rsync`, or `sudo yum install -y rsync`), then reply once it is done.
